source_test: StageDamageShould.cs (ExtrapolateFromAboveShould/ExtrapolateFromBelowShould -- the two static-helper cases) and TractableStageDamageTests.cs (the tractable Residential occ-type/structure/graphical-stage-frequency data reused to build the geometry case).
note: Phase 4 Task 6 -- ImpactAreaStageDamage GEOMETRY only (ctor + EstablishAggregationStages + the pure stage-interval helpers). Two case groups: (a) 'extrapolate_from_above'/'extrapolate_from_below' exercise the two public static helpers directly with no ImpactAreaStageDamage construction, args [inputArray, interval-or-upperInterval, i-or-stepCount, (numInterpolated for 'below' only)]; their expected values are transcribed straight from StageDamageShould.cs's [InlineData] and are still gate-routed (dispatched through the real C# static methods), not merely copy-pasted on faith. (b) 'tractable_geometry' constructs a real ImpactAreaStageDamage: graphical STAGE frequency (UsingStagesNotFlows=true) over 'probabilities'/'graphical_stages' with 'equivalent_record_length', impactAreaID='impact_area_id', usingMockData=true, and a tractable 2-structure Residential Inventory + mock HydraulicProfiles built the same way TractableStageDamageTests.ComputeStagesAtStructures(stage1, stage2) does: profile 0 = {hydraulic_stage1, hydraulic_stage2} at probabilities[0], each subsequent profile's per-structure WSE = previous profile's + 1, one profile per 'probabilities' entry. Inventory content is NOT read by any geometry method (verified against the C# source -- EstablishAggregationStages/IdentifyCentralStageFrequencyAtIndexLocation/IdentifyMinAndMaxStageWithUncertainty/SetCoordinateQuantity/ComputeStagesAtIndexLocation touch only _StageFrequency/_HydraulicDataset.HydraulicProfiles, never Inventory/Structures), so its exact composition is a realism/reuse choice (TractableStageDamageTests' residentialStructureInventory), not a value the assertions depend on. 'compute_stages_at_index_location' passes hydraulics_.profile_probabilities() (== the constructed HydraulicProfiles' probabilities, matching what Task 7's Compute() will pass via wsesAtEachStructureByProfile.Item1). All (b) values gate-captured, never hand-derived.
